title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 7-A. FAIRNESS IN WOMENS SPORTS ACT

§441. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known as and may be cited as the "Fairness in Womens Sports Act".

            Acts 2022, No. 283, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 7-A. FAIRNESS IN WOMENS SPORTS ACT
§441.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known as and may be cited as the "Fairness in Womens Sports
Act".
Acts 2022, No. 283, §1.
